---
title: "Blogs & Newsletters"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Blogs & Newsletters

## Sources surveillées

### Blogs techniques

| Blog | URL | Fréquence | Type |
|------|-----|-----------|------|
| latent.space | `latent.space` | Hebdomadaire | Interviews, analyses |
| Simon Willison | `simonwillison.net` | Quotidien | LLM, agents, tools |
| Anthropic Blog | `anthropic.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| OpenAI Blog | `openai.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| Google AI Blog | `blog.research.google` | Irrégulier | Research |
| Hugging Face Blog | `huggingface.co/blog` | Hebdomadaire | Modèles, open source |
| Mistral Blog | `mistral.ai/news` | Irrégulier | Modèles |
| Ollama Blog | `ollama.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Local LLMs |

### Newsletters

| Newsletter | URL | Fréquence | Source RSS |
|------------|-----|-----------|------------|
| The Batch | `deeplearning.ai/the-batch` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| TLDR AI | `tldr.tech/ai` | Quotidien | RSS |
| Import AI | `importai.substack.com` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| Ahead of AI | `magazine.sebastianraschka.com` | Mensuel | RSS |
| Last Week in AI | `lastweekin.ai` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| The Sequence | `thesequence.substack.com` | Quotidien | RSS |

### Agrégateurs

| Source | URL | Fréquence |
|--------|-----|-----------|
| Hacker News | `news.ycombinator.com` | Temps réel |
| Papers With Code | `paperswithcode.com` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/MachineLearning | `reddit.com/r/MachineLearning` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/LocalLLaMA | `reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA` | Quotidien |

## Pipeline RSS

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    RSS[Feeds RSS] --> PARSE[Parser feedparser]
    PARSE --> FILTER[Filtrage mots-clés]
    FILTER --> SCORE[Scoring pertinence]
    SCORE --> DEDUP[Déduplication]
    DEDUP --> FORMAT[Formatage Markdown]
    FORMAT --> FEED[Page .qmd]
    
    style RSS fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style FEED fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## Mots-clés de filtrage

| Catégorie | Mots-clés |
|-----------|-----------|
| Agentic | `agent`, `agentic`, `autonomous`, `tool calling`, `function calling` |
| LLMs | `GPT`, `Claude`, `Gemini`, `Llama`, `Mistral`, `Qwen`, `DeepSeek` |
| Inférence | `vLLM`, `SGLang`, `TensorRT`, `Ollama`, `llama.cpp` |
| RAG | `RAG`, `retrieval`, `GraphRAG`, `knowledge graph`, `embedding` |
| MCP | `MCP`, `model context protocol` |
| Code | `code agent`, `coding assistant`, `IDE`, `SWE-bench` |
| Hardware | `GPU`, `H100`, `B200`, `TPU`, `LPU`, `Groq` |

<!-- BLOG_FEED_START -->
### Last Week in AI #341 - Musk loses to OpenAI, Google's IO updates, OpenAI solves Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 27 May 2026
- **Score** : 3
- **Résumé** : Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman, Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-341-musk-loses-to

### Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : 2 years after our first coverage, we return with Modal's other cofounder to explore why Agent Experience is working now, and everything they have learned building the new agent cloud....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/modal2026

### Vercel's Andrew Qu on why agents are a new kind of software
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Fri, 03 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : The Vercel Chief of Software explains how its agent framework, eve, was created &#8212; and why skills, sandboxes and agent-readable websites now matter....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/vercel-agents-new-software

### The website of the future may assemble itself for every visitor
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 02 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Adobe is experimenting with &#8220;agentic sites&#8221; that generate pages around an individual user&#8217;s intent. At AIEWF, we talked to Carlos Sanchez about the Web's future....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/the-website-of-the-future

### Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/native-speed-vllm-transformers-backend

### ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 09 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-for-your-most-ambitious-work

### LWiAI Podcast #246 - Gemini 3.5 + Omni, Musk Loses, OpenAI vs Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 26 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Google unveils AI model Gemini 3.5 and AI agent Gemini Spark, Omni turns images, audio, and text into video, Musk loses OpenAI court battle...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-246-gemini-35-omni

### LWiAI Podcast #243 - GPT 5.5, DeepSeek V4, AI safety sabotage
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Mon, 04 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Our 243rd episode with a summary and discussion of last week&#8217;s big AI news!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-243-gpt-55-deepseek

### LWiAI Podcast #242 - ChatGPT Images 2.0, Qwen 3.6 Max, Kimi-K2.6
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Thu, 30 Apr 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : ChatGPT&#8217;s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text , Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview , SpaceX is working with Cursor...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-242-chatgpt-images

### LWiAI Podcast #237 - Nemotron 3 Super, xAI reborn, Anthropic Lawsuit, Research!
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Mon, 16 Mar 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Nemotron 3 Super: An Open Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE for Agentic Reasoning, Another XAI Cofounder Has Left, Anthropic Sues Department of Defense...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-237-nemotron-3-super

### [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Fri, 10 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : A big day for OpenAI....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-openai-launches-gpt-56-solterraluna

### Skill engineering and the case against one-shot AI design
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 02 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Paul Bakaus talks to us about Impeccable, human judgment in a 'loopmaxxing' era, and why agents still need people to steer them....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/skill-engineering-design

### Quoting OpenAI
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-10T01:05
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : [...] Work on web and mobile runs in the cloud. Work in the desktop app can also use local files and desktop apps with your permission. At launch, cloud Work conversations do not appear in desktop Wor...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/10/openai/#atom-everything

### The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-09T19:46
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : OpenAI's latest flagship model hit general availability this morning, and comes in three sizes: Luna, Terra, and Sol (from smallest to largest).
The new models are priced per 1M input/output tokens as...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/9/gpt-5-6/#atom-everything

### llm-meta-ai 0.1
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-09T16:12
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Release: llm-meta-ai 0.1
        Let's LLM run prompts against the new muse-spark-1.1 model.
    
    
        Tags: <a...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/9/llm-meta-ai/#atom-everything

### llm 0.31.1
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-09T16:06
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Release: llm 0.31.1
        

Fix for a bug with OpenAI Chat Completion endpoints where a tool call with empty arguments could result in a JSON error from some providers. <a href="https://gith...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/9/llm/#atom-everything

### Introducing GPT‑Live
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-08T23:20
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Introducing GPT‑Live
OpenAI finally upgraded the model used by ChatGPT voice mode!
I've had preview access for a few weeks in the iPhone app, and the new model is very impressive. It also has the abi...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/8/introducing-gptlive/#atom-everything

### Data for Agents
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/open-data-for-agents

### Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 07 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/skypilot-hf-storage

### GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 09 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-6-preferred-model-microsoft-365-copilot

### GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 09 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-6

### GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 09 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program...
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/bio-bug-bounty

### Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/separating-signal-from-noise-coding-evaluations

### Introducing GPT-Live
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-live

### MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 07 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/mufg

<!-- BLOG_FEED_END -->
